revision.comment: Convert to [[WP:DPP]] standardized usage template help-- someone else has already created the page! [Subst:Template doc]... what the hell is this frill?

revision.text:
({{{1}}}){{{2}}}
{{#if:{{{1|Template:Sort/doc}}}|[[{{fullurl:{{{1|Template:Sort/doc}}}}} view]] [[{{fullurl:{{{1|Template:Sort/doc}}}|action=edit}} edit]]}}[[Image:Template-info.svg|50px]] Template documentation
{{{{{1|Sort/doc}}}}}

revision.comment: Add wikilinks, which doesn't disrupt the current implementations

revision.text: {{{1}}}) {{{2|[[{{{1}}}]]}}} {{/doc}} [[Category:Sorting templates]]

revision.comment: not sure why this was here
Force the space to stay in the display:none span, even though HTMLTidy would like to pull it out. See also [[Template talk:Coord#Superfluous space]]
remove inline style, we don't need it.
rv for now. medal templates use tablesort outside of tables <head></desk>
use sort value attribute instead of hidden prefix
This edit has been reported as causing trouble for some tables.
2nd attempt, now with sortkey escaping, and protection against incorrect usage the sort templates like {{sort|{{dts|2013|07|07}}|{{dts|1990|12|01}}}}
Convert to [[WP:DPP]] standardized usage template help-- someone else has already created the page! [Subst:Template doc]... what the hell is this frill?

revision.text:
({{{1}}}){{{2}}}

{{{{{1|Sort/doc}}}}}

revision.comment: not sure why this was here
Protected Template:Sort: [[WP:HRT|frequently transcluded template]], tempting target for vandalism [edit=autoconfirmed:move=autoconfirmed]
Force the space to stay in the display:none span, even though HTMLTidy would like to pull it out. See also [[Template talk:Coord#Superfluous space]]
remove inline style, we don't need it.
rv for now. medal templates use tablesort outside of tables <head></desk>
use sort value attribute instead of hidden prefix
2nd attempt, now with sortkey escaping, and protection against incorrect usage the sort templates like {{sort|{{dts|2013|07|07}}|{{dts|1990|12|01}}}}
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
